title: Sealapack 25 Swing Bin Liners Extra Strong
features: NEATLY TIED UP: Sealapack Swing Bin liners allow you to get household rubbish all tied-up neatly for easy disposal. Holding a large 50 litre capacity the bags are perfect for a busy home. Suitable for use in bedrooms, bathrooms, a home office, garden shed or workshop
FRAGRANCE FREE: Each bag is fragrance free, white, durable with tie handles. Use in the home, in the car, to clear away after a party or catering event
VALUE FOR MONEY: Easily keep rooms around the home clean and free from rubbish. Adding a liner to the bin inexpensiely keeps them clean and free from spills and stains
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: ROLL OF 25 BAGS
